_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of how traffic flows across the network (e.g., Transmission Control Protocol [TCP] and Internet Protocol [IP], Open System Interconnection Model [OSI], Information Technology Infrastructure Library, current version [ITIL]).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP, DNS resolution, HTTP/HTTPS protocols, firewall and security group configurations, load balancing, and how network architecture affects data pipeline design and performance.
comments: DCWF ksa equal WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-004 (DA, cosine: 0.518), DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.516).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.648). Shared vocabulary: [ip, knowledge, network, tcp]. DCWF-only terms [across, control, current, flows, information, infrastructure] vs WIDAI-only terms [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.848 (P=0.832, R=0.864). R exceeds P by 0.032 — the WIDAI KSA's 31 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 29 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of how traffic flows across the network (e.g., Transmission Control Pr" and "Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.697 ≈ STS 0.648 (gap 0.049). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ip, knowledge, network, tcp] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.5%. Shared tokens: [ip, knowledge, network, tcp]. DCWF-only: [across, control, current, flows, information, infrastructure]. WIDAI-only: [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, design].
